center.name: 丹尼斯島
center.summary: 丹尼斯島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Seychelles blue pigeon、塞舌爾艷織雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Seychelles blue pigeon (Alectroenas pulcherrimus), also known as the Seychelles blue fruit dove, is a medium-sized pigeon which inhabits woodland areas of the granitic Seychelles archipelago

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Newton]], 1867 }} The Seychelles fody (Foudia sechellarum) is a small yellowish songbird that are native to the Seychelles islands of Cousin Island, Cousine Island, Frégate Island, and have been introduced to Aride Island, D'Arros Island and as of 2004 Denis Island
